overall.description: Aerial drone footage from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a smooth forward flight over the dense urban sprawl of Night City. The camera approaches the downtown skyline with a massive stadium structure visible on the left and complex highway interchanges below, capturing the contrast between low-rise residential blocks and towering corporate skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of cyberpunk urban outskirts with stadium

agents.ego_description: piloting drone steadily forward over dense urban landscape toward city center

entered.detail: massive circular stadium with yellow lighting and industrial platforms on the left side of the frame
complex multi-level highway interchange with looping ramps in the distance
dense cluster of tall glass and steel corporate towers forming the downtown skyline
dense low-rise residential buildings with red and brown rooftops filling the foreground
large concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti murals on the left edge

segments.scene_description: Opening aerial shot revealing a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. The drone flies forward over dense residential blocks with a massive stadium megastructure dominating the left side. Highway interchanges weave through the center while the downtown skyscraper cluster rises in the hazy distance under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial approach to highway interchange and river district

events.description: river canal becomes visible on the right side as drone moves forward

agents.ego_description: continuing drone flight with steady forward motion over highway infrastructure

entered.detail: waterway running along the right side of the frame with industrial buildings along its banks
large industrial building with visible markings and storage tanks on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The drone continues its approach toward the city center, passing over the complex highway interchange that now dominates the center of the frame. The river canal becomes visible on the right, bordered by industrial structures, while the stadium recedes into the left background. The downtown skyscrapers grow larger as the camera maintains its steady forward trajectory.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial trajectory over a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape that shifts from a wide view of residential blocks to a focused approach toward the downtown core. It begins by gliding over dense housing districts with a massive stadium megastructure dominating the left side and a hazy cluster of skyscrapers rising in the far distance under a clear blue sky. As the drone maintains its steady forward momentum, the stadium recedes into the background while a complex network of highway interchanges expands to fill the center of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal a river canal bordered by industrial structures on the right, just as the distant corporate towers grow larger and more imposing. Finally, the camera closes the gap with the city center, transitioning from the outskirts of the urban sprawl into the heart of the towering skyline.
